name: Pipeline Fighters Hub / Bold Alliance
title: EXTRACTED daily clips — Ohio moves to lease 23,000 acres of public wildlife areas to fracking
snippet: Movement digest: Ohio could open 23,000 acres of publicly owned wildlife preserves to fracking in one vote (Save Ohio Parks); Michigan Line 5 comment deadline nears; Bakken East pipeline comment period opens.

name: Pipeline Fighters Hub / Bold Alliance
title: EXTRACTED daily clips — Enbridge seeks Line 5 tunnel permit; LA pipeline rupture evacuates families
snippet: Enbridge seeks a renewed wastewater permit for the Line 5 tunnel (public hearing set); Jackson Parish, LA families evacuated after a pipeline rupture; Bastrop County, TX residents fight a proposed gas pipeline.

name: National Wildlife Federation
title: Army Corps’ final EIS for the Line 5 tunnel buries the risks to the Great Lakes
snippet: The Army Corps’ final Environmental Impact Statement for the Line 5 tunnel — and the process behind it — buries the risks the pipeline poses to the wildlife, water and people of the Great Lakes.

name: Cardinal News
title: Mountain Valley Pipeline, critics clash over Southgate extension plan
snippet: Opponents ask regulators to deny MVP’s 31-mile Southgate extension into North Carolina; eight environmental groups argue FERC has fallen short of its legal duties by not requiring a new review.

name: Elko Daily
title: Permits approved for Thacker Pass lithium mine — Great Basin Resource Watch appeals
snippet: Nevada issues water, reclamation and air permits for Thacker Pass; Great Basin Resource Watch and Western Watersheds Project challenge the approvals.

name: U.S. Dept. of Energy
title: Notice: Venture Global CP2 LNG seeks new long-term export authorization (Docket 26-78-LNG)
snippet: DOE gives notice of a July 7, 2026 application by CP2 LNG to export up to 620.5 Bcf/yr from its proposed expansion in Cameron Parish, LA; a Federal Register notice will follow.

name: Global Energy Monitor
title: CP2 LNG Terminal — tracker profile (owners, financiers, capacity)
snippet: GEM tracks CP2’s two 10-mtpa phases, the 48-inch CP Express pipeline, FERC’s 2-1 approval, and the $15.1B Phase-1 lender group behind Venture Global’s Cameron Parish terminal.

name: 2News (KTVN)
title: Thacker Pass enters new construction phase; lawmakers seek investigation
snippet: 1,100+ workers on-site and 24/7 operations begin; lawmakers seek an investigation after records show an official’s family allegedly profited from the lithium project.

name: Virginia DEQ
title: DEQ issues final Water Protection permit for MVP Southgate
snippet: Virginia DEQ issued VWP Individual Permit No. 25-0752 for MVP’s ~31-mile Southgate Amendment after a public comment period and hearing.

name: Natural Gas Intelligence
title: Venture Global advancing CP2 LNG construction, seeks major expansion
snippet: Venture Global moves CP2 construction forward and files with FERC to expand output; MVP separately cleared its final hurdle to build the North Carolina leg of Southgate.

name: Nevada Appeal
title: Lithium Americas: 900 construction workers at Thacker Pass mine
snippet: Construction spans ~6,000 acres; the ~$3B project is backed by a $2.23B DOE loan and nearly $1B from GM; contract miner Sawtooth (North American Coal) is doing mass grading.
